headline: Does Lockheed’s GM Defense Pact and New Contracts Reinforce the Bull Case For Lockheed Martin (LMT)?
summary: Earlier this week, Lockheed Martin and GM Defense announced a memorandum of understanding to combine Lockheed’s defense production with GM’s high‑rate commercial manufacturing to strengthen U.S. defense supply chains, design capabilities and production capacity, while Lockheed also secured multi‑hundred‑million‑dollar GPS IIIF satellite and SONAR contracts plus multi‑billion‑dollar F‑35 sustainment and missile awards. headline: Lockheed Martin, Government Officials Tout Site's 75 Years of Manufacturing Excellence and a Strong Future
summary: Lockheed Martin (NYSE: LMT) in Marietta, Georgia, marked its 75th anniversary as a U.S. Center for Manufacturing Excellence June 17, showcasing cutting‑edge technology and innovation that will sustain the facility's mission of delivering solutions for the nation and its allies for generations to come.

headline: Lockheed Martin (LMT) Teams Up With GM Defense To Rework U.S. Defense Manufacturing
summary: Lockheed Martin and GM Defense announced a new partnership to expand U.S. defense manufacturing capacity. The collaboration is backed by the U.S. Department of War and targets faster production of critical defense systems. The companies aim to improve supply chain resilience and manufacturing agility in response to ongoing global conflicts. Lockheed Martin, traded as NYSE:LMT, is entering this partnership with GM Defense from a position of established scale in defense production. The stock...

headline: Chips Crack the Rally - Dow Keeps Climbing, SpaceX Passes Amazon
summary: Monday's all-everything rally lasted exactly one session. Tuesday was the kind of split tape that reminds you why an index print can hide more than it reveals, the Dow Jones pushed to another record while the semiconductor complex got taken to the woodshed.
